launch.title: One-page checkout rollout
launch.prd_summary: Redesign shipping, payment, promo, and address steps for a one-page checkout.
launch.qa_summary: Core checkout happy path tested. Promo code edge cases not fully covered.
launch.rollout_plan: Roll out to 100% of traffic in 2 days.
launch.dependency_notes: Payment gateway migration still in progress.
launch.incident_context: Two payment-related incidents occurred in the past month.

launch.title: Search facet update
launch.prd_summary: Launch 8 new search filters for improved discovery.
launch.qa_summary: Search filter behavior tested on desktop only.
launch.dependency_notes: Search backend incident unresolved but mitigations documented.
launch.incident_context: Recent search latency incident; no relevance incident in last 30 days.

launch.title: Returns policy update
launch.prd_summary: Update returns policy messaging and exception handling.
launch.dependency_notes: CX tooling changes may be required.

launch.title: PDP cross-sell module
launch.prd_summary: Introduce cross-sell module on PDP for upsell.
launch.qa_summary: Core rendering tested; no tracking validation noted.
launch.rollout_plan: Roll out to 100% immediately after QA sign-off.
launch.dependency_notes: Analytics event spec updated last minute.
launch.incident_context: Tracking regressions occurred in similar module launch last quarter.
